overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a neon-lit nightclub bar area, ascending a red-lit stairwell, and emerging into a rainy Night City urban plaza with large holographic billboards and elevated walkways.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk nightclub bar with neon red staircase

events.description: player approaches and stops briefly near woman with purple hair standing at bar

agents.ego_description: walking along the bar counter approaching a woman with purple hair dressed in blue

notable_agents.action: woman with purple hair in metallic blue outfit standing by the bar counter

entered.detail: staircase with bright red neon lighting visible through doorway in background
long counter with drink taps and bottles lined along surface
cyan fluorescent tube lights running along ceiling above bar
shelves with bottles and bar supplies behind counter

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a dimly lit cyberpunk bar with cyan overhead lights and a long counter on the right. A distinctive red neon staircase glows in the background left, while the player approaches a woman with purple hair standing near the bar.

scene_state.functional_zone: back lounge area transitioning to red-lit emergency stairwell

events.description: passing through doorway from main bar into back lounge area with bench seating
beginning ascent of narrow staircase with red LED lighting on steps

agents.ego_description: walking through lounge with seated patrons and ascending the red neon-lit stairwell toward the exit

notable_agents.action: person sitting on bench illuminated by blue neon underlighting

entered.detail: seating area with blue neon lighting underneath benches
wall-mounted displays showing abstract visual patterns
narrow enclosed staircase with red LED strips illuminating each step
green illuminated exit sign above door at top of stairs

segments.scene_description: The player moves from the bar into a darker lounge area with blue-lit benches and digital screens, then enters and climbs a narrow stairwell bathed in intense red neon light, heading toward an exit sign at the top.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with holographic advertisements and wet reflective pavement

events.description: exiting building through smoky doorway into night city street
turning right to follow path alongside escalator structure

agents.ego_description: walking through wet urban plaza with large digital billboards and scattered groups of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of people standing near building entrance smoking

entered.detail: large digital advertisements on building facades displaying animated content
reflective concrete ground surface with puddles reflecting neon lights
tall illuminated poles lighting the plaza area
outdoor escalator and stair structure with metal framework

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairwell into the night, the player enters a wide urban plaza with wet pavement reflecting the glow of massive holographic billboards. Groups of pedestrians stand near the entrance as the player walks past an outdoor escalator structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered elevated pedestrian walkway with digital advertising screens

events.description: ascending concrete stairs to reach elevated walkway level
entering covered walkway with glass views overlooking street level

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs to elevated walkway and proceeding through covered corridor with digital screens on walls

entered.detail: enclosed pedestrian bridge with overhead cover and walls
large vertical displays showing video content and advertisements
transparent barrier overlooking street level below
warm yellow LED strips along walkway edges and base of walls

segments.scene_description: The player ascends from the plaza into a covered elevated walkway, leaving the open rain behind. The corridor features warm strip lighting, digital advertising screens on the walls, and glass railings offering views down to the city streets below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dimly lit cyberpunk bar into a narrow, intensely red-lit stairwell. It begins by gliding through a lounge area characterized by cyan overhead lights and a long counter, passing a purple-haired woman standing near the bar. As the camera moves deeper into the venue, the space shifts into a darker lounge area filled with blue-lit benches and digital screens. The scene then transitions into a tight ascent as the player enters a stairwell bathed in glowing red neon, climbing upward toward a visible exit sign at the top.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-slicked urban plaza into the sheltered environment of an elevated walkway. It begins as the camera emerges from a stairwell into the night, moving across wet pavement that reflects the vibrant glow of massive holographic billboards. As the camera passes groups of pedestrians and an outdoor escalator structure, the scene shifts from the open rain toward a rising architectural path. The movement then transitions upward into a covered corridor, where the cool outdoor atmosphere is replaced by warm strip lighting and digital advertising screens. Finally, the camera glides along glass railings that provide a descending view of the city streets below.
